name: GET /api/metering/summary
description:
Get a breakdown of current usage vs plan limits. 
Superadmins see global totals. Tenant admins see organization-wide totals.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.value: {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/metering/summary', 'details': {'tags': ['metering'], 'summary': 'Get My Usage Summary', 'description': 'Get a breakdown of current usage vs plan limits. \nSuperadmins see global totals.
